name: groundwork
description: Run the pre-coding discovery for internal platform and operational tooling, as the partner to a human who conducts the real user interviews — prep the question banks before, structure the capture during, synthesize between. A gate-first router over five branches (as-is process recovery, the operator-vs-commissioner politics, domain language and systems of record, problem framing, and a thin first slice), each leaf emitting one concrete filed artifact. Treats every component as an uncertainty to reduce, not a phase to finish, and stops clean at the engineering handoff. NOT consumer/market-demand discovery — it gates on that and declines.
